subject: fix(ux): expand Structure tab Grid section by default
body:
Users opening the Structure tab saw only a collapsed "Grid" dropdown with
empty space below — no visual indication of what the tab contains. Since
Grid is the only section in this tab, collapsing it by default adds friction
with no benefit.

Tags: ux, mobile, layout
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
